articles.title: XRP Surges to All-time High Market Capitalization of $192 Billion
articles.description: Whales have accumulated approximately $3.8 billion in XRP since Nov. 12, according to Santiment.

articles.title: US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent says Elon Musk’s D.O.G.E is highly needed
articles.description: Scott Bessent walked into his Senate confirmation hearing today with one clear goal: to champion the radical changes coming to Washington. The billionaire investor and Donald Trump’s pick for Treasury Secretary didn’t waste time defending Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency (D.O.G.E). Scott declared the department “absolutely essential” to the administration’s economic policies....

articles.title: Coinbase brings back Bitcoin-backed loans with Morpho’s DeFi integration
articles.description: Coinbase has introduced Bitcoin-backed loans through its partnership with Morpho, a decentralized finance protocol with $3.7 billion in total value locked.This new service allows users to borrow up to $100,000 in USDC instantly without selling their Bitcoin.The service represents Coinbase's return to Bitcoin lending after ending its previous Borrow program in November 2023, which had offered...

articles.title: Solana (SOL) Surpasses $100 Billion Market Capitalization Amid Crypto Market Rally
articles.description: The price of the native token of smart contract platform Solana (SOL) has surged nearly 5% over the last 24-hour period in a move that saw its total market capitalization top the $100 billion mark. The price of SOL surged amid a wider cryptocurrency market movement that saw the price of XRP, for example, move […]

articles.title: XRP Witnesses Epic Breakout Versus Bitcoin and Ethereum
articles.description: Bitcoin and Ethereum in red versus XRP after all-time-high breakout

articles.title: XRP price to $10–$50 'plausible' if spot ETF approved, ChatGPT says
articles.description: As an experiment, Cointelegraph asked two different AI models, OpenAI’s ChatGPT and xAI's Grok, to predict how XRP price could be affected by a spot ETF approval.

articles.title: Trump reportedly talking to Ripple with interest in XRP, USDC, Solana for US national reserve
articles.description: President-elect Donald Trump is reportedly exploring the inclusion of US-developed digital currencies like Ripple’s XRP and Solana in his proposed national crypto reserve, the New York Post reported on Jan. 16, citing insider sources. This move aligns with his campaign pledge to establish a Bitcoin reserve alongside other potential crypto-focused policies to strengthen the US […] The post...

articles.title: Trump reportedly ‘receptive’ to strategic reserve with US-based cryptos
articles.description: Donald Trump is reportedly open to establishing a strategic reserve that would include US-founded cryptocurrencies and Bitcoin.

articles.title: Cardano Founder Praises XRP Community's Resilience and Ripple CTO
articles.description: Charles Hoskinson believes the XRP community is “resilient as ever” and Ripple CTO is “super smart”

articles.title: Trump Considers US-based Crypto Reserve
articles.description: Trump considers establishing a US-based crypto reserve, potentially prioritizing leading assets like Solana and XRP in a major digital finance move.

articles.title: SEC Appeals Ripple Ruling, Seeks Reversal on XRP Classification
articles.description: While the regulator already filed its appeal in mid-October, Wednesday’s opening brief represents a formal step in the appellate process.
